title: Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.9: Yajnavalkya's Cosmic Teaching
description: From the Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.9 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.9 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: How many gods are there, Yajnavalkya? Three hundred and three, and three thousand and three. How many gods are there really? Thirty-three. How many gods are there really? Six. How many gods are there really? Three. How many gods are there really? Two. How many gods are there really? One and a half. How many gods are there really? One.
